6c20315c097c997b.resultTeX: \frac{\log \left(\frac{M_2^2}{s_{12}}\right)-\log \left(s_{12} M_4^{-2}\right)+\log \left(\frac{M_2^2}{s_{23}}\right)-\log \left(s_{23} M_4^{-2}\right)}{\varepsilon \left(s_{12} s_{23}-M_2^2 M_4^2\right)}+\frac{-2 H\left(\frac{s_{12}}{s_{12}-M_2^2},\frac{M_4^2}{M_4^2-s_{23}}\,;1\right)-2 H\left(\frac{s_{23}}{s_{23}-M_2^2},\frac{M_4^2}{M_4^2-s_{12}}\,;1\right)+2 H\left(0,\frac{s_{12}}{s_{12}-M_2^2}\,;1\right)-2 H\left(0,\frac{1}{1-s_{12} M_4^{-2}}\,;1\right)+2 H\left(0,\frac{s_{23}}{s_{23}-M_2^2}\,;1\right)-2 H\left(0,\frac{1}{1-s_{23} M_4^{-2}}\,;1\right)+\log ^2\left(\frac{M_2^2}{s_{12}}\right)-2 \log \left(-M_2^2\right) \log \left(\frac{M_2^2}{s_{12}}\right)+2 \log \left(-M_2^2\right) \log \left(s_{12} M_4^{-2}\right)+\log ^2\left(\frac{M_2^2}{s_{23}}\right)-2 \log \left(-M_2^2\right) \log \left(\frac{M_2^2}{s_{23}}\right)+2 \log \left(-M_2^2\right) \log \left(s_{23} M_4^{-2}\right)}{2 \left(s_{12} s_{23}-M_2^2 M_4^2\right)}+O\left(\varepsilon^1\right)
